properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Beyond this flesh That you can see now Beyond all weaknesses of this flesh There is a connection Invisible with Jesus Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I don't know how, I don't why I cannot explain the love of God for my soul But down inside of me when I hear the Word My heart says Amen – I’ll say Amen

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He has said that I will be perfect With the virtues of Jesus Christ Himself But I look around, I can still see imperfections Shown to me by the devil my enemy Trying to get me sad and depressed But I stand right up on my two feet Look at him straight in the eyes and I say:

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has said that I will be raptured To fly away in the sky And discover this other dimension But I can still feel the force of gravity Trying to pull me down to this earth And get me stuck in this realm But I stand right up on my two feet - I lift my hands challenging gravity and I say:
